description: Stylish and uber cool, these formal slip-ons with a pointed toe design from provogue add that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, this pair offers comfort and style with its crinkled pattern. Team it with your formal trousers for that classy look.Upper Shiny leather upper for added durability and style Concealed elastic gores on either side of the lace closure for a versatile Fit Slip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Mock strap across the tongue for max style Lightly padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Cushioned footbed for added comfort Leather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Raised heel with textured pattern for ergonomic comfort and style shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
